news.headline: CROWDSTRIKE: RECEIVED REQUESTS FROM DOJ AND SEC FOR INFORMATION, RESPONDING TO REQUESTS

news.summary: Thor Industries, Inc. (NYSE: THO) reported third-quarter EPS of $2.53, surpassing the street consensus of $1.83. Quarterly sales were $2.89 billion, a 3.3% increase Y/Y, higher than the estimated $2.48 billion. Gross profit margin expanded by 20 basis points to 15.3%. Adjusted EBITDA saw a 7.9% increase Y/Y to $254.8 million. North American Towable RV net sales rose by 9.1% Y/Y, benefiting from higher unit shipments and increased net price per unit. North American Motorized RV net sales increased by 3.1% Y/Y, with a rise in unit shipments though with a decrease in net price per unit. Gross profit margins for both divisions saw improvement attributed to higher sales and improved cost efficiency. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: THO's European sales decline, caution on macro outlook. Q3 EPS $2.53 beats $1.83 consensus. Sales: $2.89B, up 3.3% Y/Y. Adj. EBITDA $254.8M, up 7.9% Y/Y. Towable RV sales up 9.1% Y/Y, motorized RV sales up 3.1% Y/Y. Profit margins increase.
Mexico is expected to renew its antitrust approval of Nippon Steel's $14.9 billion bid for US Steel as soon as Thursday - Sources.

news.summary: Even with a 50 percent tariff exemption, Britain is still facing a significant 25 percent duty due to the absence of a trade deal with the United States.
news.headline: Britain avoids 50% steel tariffs but faces 25% duty due to delayed deal with US, while Europe pays double the taxes.

news.summary: The deceased financier and convicted sex offender, Mr. Epstein, initially invested $40 million in Valar Ventures, a company supported by Mr. Thiel. As of now, the value of that investment has risen to approximately $170 million.
news.headline: Jeffrey Epstein's $40 million investment with Peter Thiel's Valar Ventures has grown to around $170 million.

news.summary: TeachTown, a prominent company in special education curriculum for students with moderate to severe disabilities, based in Woburn, Massachusetts, revealed on June 4, 2025, that their program enCORE has clinched the title of "Special Education Solution of the Year" during the 7th edition of EdTech awards. This recognition highlights the effectiveness and impact of enCORE in catering to the educational needs of students with disabilities, showcasing TeachTown's commitment to providing quality education solutions in this niche.
news.headline: TeachTown's enCORE wins "Special Education Solution of the Year" in 7th EdTech Breakthrough Awards.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has introduced enhanced visibility features to enhance all operations, leading to a significant improvement in standard operating procedure compliance and overall operational efficiency. Made4net, a prominent company specializing in cloud-based Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), played a key role in this partnership. The development was officially announced in Teaneck, N.J. on June 4, 2025. This joint effort is aimed at fostering immediate positive effects across various activities, demonstrating a clear commitment to driving excellence within the organization.
news.headline: Made4net & Flymingo partner for AI-driven computer vision in warehouses to improve SOP adherence. Teaneck, NJ, Jun 4, 2025.

news.summary: The distribution of free tokens was intended to assess the platform's preparedness for launching DeFi services on a larger scale.
news.headline: World Liberty Financial, supported by Trump, distributes stablecoins to 85,000 wallets to test the DeFi platform.

news.summary: In Lafayette, Colorado, Xairos has been recognized as the Top Innovator in the Quantum for Society Challenge, a prestigious title awarded in collaboration with the World Economic Forum, UpLink, and C4IR Saudi Arabia. This achievement was celebrated on World Quantum Day and signifies Xairos' groundbreaking contributions to the field of quantum technology.
news.headline: Xairos wins Top Innovator in Quantum for Society Challenge at World Economic Forum, UpLink, and C4IR Saudi Arabia.

news.summary: In a collaboration, a renowned natural history museum in Chicago will now offer enhanced retail experiences focused on education, exploration, and sustainability. The partnership with SSA Group, a prominent provider of retail, food, and admissions services, aims to create curated and interactive experiences for visitors. This initiative, launched on June 4, 2025, is set to elevate the museum's offerings and engage guests in a novel way.
news.headline: SSA Group becomes new retail partner of Field Museum, offering interactive experiences focused on education and sustainability.

news.summary: President Trump, along with his supporters, have come together to confront a fresh adversary: economists and budget specialists cautioning about the expenses related to the GOP's tax goals.
news.headline: GOP disputes economists warning on tax cuts' expenses as President Trump and allies target critics.

The European Commission has announced that Bulgaria can adopt the euro on January 1 next year. The decision, announced in the Commission's 2025 Convergence Report on June 4, will make Bulgaria eligible to become the 21st EU member state to join the euro area.

news.summary: A prominent office property owner, CP Group, has disclosed the cash purchase of Piedmont Center in Atlanta. This 14-building office complex spans 2.2 million square feet and is situated in the Buckhead business district. The acquisition highlights CP Group's dedication to revamping institutional office properties into contemporary, experiential spaces. This deal has bolstered CP Group's Atlanta presence to over 8 million square feet.
news.headline: CP Group buys 2.2MM sq ft Piedmont Center in Atlanta's Buckhead district, expanding Atlanta holdings to 8MM sq ft.

news.summary: The 22nd Latinas & Power Symposium held in Hartford, Connecticut on June 4, 2025, showcased achievements and a commitment to mentor the next generation. The event garnered $52,000 in funds, emphasizing its success in inspiring and leading.
news.headline: $52,000 raised for Latinas in Leadership Institute during 22nd Annual Latinas & Power Symposium in Hartford, CT.

news.summary: Enterprise Products Partners L.P. revealed on June 3, 2025, receiving a notification from the U.S. Department of Commerce's Bureau of Industry and Security regarding the rejection of Emergency Authorization Requests connected to three ethane shipments to China. The total volume of these proposed cargoes amounts to roughly 2.2 million barrels. In response to the Notice, Enterprise is granted a twenty-day window to provide feedback or counterarguments to BIS.
news.headline: BIS to deny export licenses for 2.2 million barrels of ethane to China; Enterprise has 20 days to respond.

news.summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc (NYSE: UNH) re-elected all current directors and announced a cash dividend increase from $2.10 to $2.21 per share. The dividend will be paid on June 24 to common stock shareholders as of June 16. CEO Andrew Witty resigned in May for personal reasons, and Stephen Hemsley took over. The company suspended its 2025 outlook and canceled performance-based stock units granted to Witty. The stock has dropped nearly 40% this year, mainly after disappointing fourth-quarter earnings in 2024. Options Corner suggests a potential recovery for UnitedHealth.
news.headline: UnitedHealth reelects directors, boosts dividend to $2.21/share. CEO review of Medicare practices pledged. Stock down 40% YTD.

news.summary: In Tegucigalpa, Honduras, on June 4, 2025, the Central American Bank for Economic Integration (CABEI) announced a reduction in interest rates for the second year in a row. The bank decreased its rates by 15 basis points for sovereign public sector operations under the variable spread interest. This decision aims to stimulate economic growth and development in the region.
news.headline: CABEI lowers interest rates by 15 basis points for second year in a row under new financial strategy.

news.summary: Duluth Holdings (NASDAQ: DLTH) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on June 5, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.42. The company had previously missed EPS estimates by $0.15, resulting in a 9.7% share price drop. In the last 52 weeks, Duluth Holdings' shares have decreased by 42.9%, leaving long-term shareholders dissatisfied. Analysts rate the company as Neutral. Investors hope for a positive earnings report and guidance for the next quarter to influence stock price movements. Staying informed about market sentiments is crucial for investors.
news.headline: Duluth Holdings (NASDAQ: DLTH) to announce quarterly earnings on 06-05-2025 with estimated EPS of $-0.42. Past EPS results resulted in share price fluctuations. Stock at $2.07, down 42.9% in 52 weeks. Analysts rate as Neutral.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: ERE.UN), known as ERES, shared that all agenda items outlined in the April 10, 2025 management information circular were approved during its Annual Meeting of Unitholders. The votes for each item were conducted through a ballot system.
news.headline: European Residential REIT (TSX: ERE.UN) announces results of 2025 Annual Meeting with all business items passed by ballot.

news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between Elucidata and Sapien Biosciences, with offices in San Francisco and Hyderabad, India respectively, aimed at converting biobank assets into advanced AI products. This partnership is set to revolutionize the field by combining expertise and resources.
news.headline: Elucidata and Sapien Biosciences partner to transform biobank assets into AI products.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Postman, a renowned API collaboration platform, has introduced new features to aid in the development and monitoring of AI agents and their associated APIs. These enhancements were revealed at the POST/CON conference, Postman's annual event. Key updates include the launch of the open beta version of Postman Insights, significant improvements to the Postman API Network, and additional tools to enhance teamwork. These advancements come as the AI sector rapidly advances, with Postman at the forefront of innovation.
news.headline: Postman unveils new features for AI development at POST/CON conference in LA. Includes Postman Insights open beta.

news.summary: Today, in Los Angeles, Postman introduced Agent Mode, an AI-native assistant within their API collaboration platform. This feature aims to enhance productivity throughout the API lifecycle by understanding and executing developer tasks like designing, testing, documenting, and monitoring APIs through natural language commands. Agent Mode reduces manual effort significantly, allowing tasks that typically take weeks to complete to be done in mere hours. This innovation is set to revolutionize API management processes.
news.headline: Postman introduces Agent Mode, AI assistant for APIs, reducing manual work from weeks to hours.

news.summary: Sandals Resorts is calling upon guests to participate in marine conservation initiatives across five islands, with expanded reef restoration efforts now including The Bahamas and Curaçao. This announcement was made on June 4, 2025, in Montego Bay, Jamaica. The endeavor is part of the World Ocean Month celebrations and underscores Sandals' commitment to environmental preservation. The resort, along with its philanthropic arm, is aiming to engage visitors in actively contributing to the restoration of marine ecosystems. The project will not only benefit the oceans but also the communities and economies of the locations involved.
news.headline: Sandals Resorts launches new coral restoration programs across five Caribbean islands, including The Bahamas and Curaçao. #OceanConservation

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Bangalore, India, the market for Customer Support Software is outlined by its segmentation based on type, including Call Management, FS/D (Field Service and Dispatch), and Contact Center. It is further categorized by application, covering sectors such as Banking, Finance and Insurance (BFSI), IT, and Telecommunications, Government and Health Care, among others. Key industry figures and market statistics are not provided in this rephrased snippet.
news.headline: Global customer support software market to grow at 21.1% CAGR; segmented by type & application. Reported from Bangalore, India.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is currently experiencing a significant struggle at the $105,000 mark for Bitcoin as bulls and bears vie for control. However, amidst this volatility, various alternative coins (altcoins) are demonstrating resilience and potential breakout opportunities.
news.headline: Latest crypto price predictions: BTC challenges $105K, while altcoins like ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA are in breakout mode.

news.summary: Ciena is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on June 5, 2025, with analysts predicting an EPS of $0.52. Investors are eager to see if Ciena surpasses this estimate and provides positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, the company exceeded expectations by $0.23, resulting in a 3.83% increase in share price. Ciena's shares were valued at $83.26 on June 3, marking a 74.96% increase over the past year. Analysts have given Ciena a "Neutral" rating, with an average one-year price target of $79.93, suggesting a potential 4.0% decrease. Market sentiments and expectations play a crucial role in understanding the industry's outlook for the company.
news.headline: Ciena to announce quarterly earnings ($0.52 EPS estimate) on 2025-06-05. Past performance shows positive trends. Analysts rate stock neutral with $79.93 target (4.0% downside).
AGM outcomes revealed: important numbers discussed.
Extension of the revolving credit facility drawdown for another half-year.

news.summary: According to reports from insiders, a financial institution will now consider cryptocurrency assets as part of a client's total wealth and available funds. This decision signifies a shift in traditional wealth evaluation practices, emphasizing the importance of including digital currency holdings when determining a client's financial standing.
news.headline: JPMorgan will accept BlackRock Bitcoin ETF shares as loan collateral, incorporating crypto in assessing client assets.

news.summary: SAN DIEGO – MANSCAPED®, a leading men’s grooming company, in collaboration with gaming agency Druid Creative, introduces "Razor Island," a unique Fortnite map and game mode. This innovative experience immerses players in a virtual grooming adventure set in a MANSCAPED-themed landscape, featuring quests to craft a top-notch grooming arsenal and the ability to groom through the world's first shaveable island in Fortnite. The launch offers gamers an exceptional opportunity to engage in an interactive and creative gaming experience.
news.headline: MANSCAPED® and Druid Creative launch “Razor Island,” Fortnite’s first shaveable gaming experience - an immersive virtual grooming adventure.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Vineland, New Jersey, JOYROOM, a well-known consumer electronics company catering to the needs of young consumers, unveiled its newest product, the JOYROOM OE3 Clip-On Earbuds. These innovative earbuds offer an open-ear design and are designed to meet the demands of modern lifestyles. This launch showcases JOYROOM's commitment to providing cutting-edge technology to its customers.
news.headline: JOYROOM launches new OE3 Clip-On Earbuds for young consumers; designed for easy wear and effortless control.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Anaheim Hills, California, the merger between Credit Union of Southern California (CU SoCal) and LA Financial Credit Union (LA Financial) was completed. This merger also incorporated Havasu Community Credit Union, previously a division of LA Financial. Following the merger, LA Financial is set to undergo changes.
news.headline: Credit Union of Southern California merges with LA Financial & Havasu Community Credit Union, finalizing the merger deal on June 4, 2025. (Numbers not provided in the excerpt)

news.summary: This information is not intended for release in the United States of America, Australia, Canada, Hong Kong, Japan, or any jurisdiction where it would be unlawful. On June 4, 2025, in Frøya, it was noted that Kaldvík AS released a stock exchange report and presentation on May 28, 2025, detailing the Company's Q1 report and refinancing plans. The Company has secured a revised bank financing package from current lenders, contingent upon raising additional equity, as indicated in the report.
news.headline: Kaldvík AS secures EUR 46.2 million through pre-committed private placement and new debt financing.

news.summary: In Tacoma, Washington, on June 4, 2025, Emerald Queen Casino & Hotel (EQC), which belongs to the Puyallup Tribe of Indians, has revealed a significant partnership with the Tacoma Dome. This collaboration, set to last five years, establishes EQC as the formal casino hotel associate of the renowned South Sound location.
news.headline: Emerald Queen Casino & Tacoma Dome partner for 5 years to boost entertainment, owned by Puyallup Tribe of Indians.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in Austin, Texas, engage2learn (e2L), a strategic implementation partner for public school districts, unveiled a significant upgrade to GroweLab, its acclaimed implementation and support platform. This enhancement allows educators, coaches, and school leaders to easily access and utilize the platform.
news.headline: engage2learn introduces AI-powered feedback tool in GroweLab to aid educator growth in public schools.

news.summary: A cutting-edge development will transform the operational database into a robust native AI engine, meeting the rising need for engineering teams to provide GenAI functionalities. The innovation is being introduced by RavenDB in HADERA, Israel and SANTA CLARA, Calif., on June 4, 2025. This advancement signifies a significant leap forward in database technology, enhancing the capacity of systems to incorporate AI capabilities effectively.
news.headline: RavenDB introduces GenAI capabilities into operational data layer, meeting demand for AI integration. HADERA, Israel and SANTA CLARA, Calif., June 4, 2025.

news.summary: A collaborative effort between Oregon Public Broadcasting (OPB) and Lewis & Clark Law School aims to enhance access to public information for both rural and urban communities in Portland, Oregon. The partnership, announced on June 4, 2025, seeks to strengthen the dissemination of crucial information to a wider audience. This initiative is set to benefit a significant number of individuals residing in various regions across Oregon, with the ultimate goal of promoting transparency and connectivity within the state.
news.headline: OPB and Lewis & Clark Law School team up to enhance public information access for rural and urban areas in Oregon.

Gaza’s main aid distribution centres will close on Wednesday, with the Israeli military warning that roads leading to the sites will be treated as active combat zones. The Gaza Humanitarian Foundation (GHF), a new and controversial U.S.-backed aid network, says the closure is for

news.summary: Today, Nucleus Genomics introduced Nucleus Embryo, a pioneering genetic optimization software in New York City on June 4, 2025. This revolutionary software offers parents utilizing in vitro fertilization (IVF) a higher degree of control over their family planning decisions. In light of the declining birthrates in the United States, the launch of Nucleus Embryo represents a new era in assisted reproductive technology. Through this software, parents can access advanced tools to optimize the genetic characteristics of embryos before implantation, marking a significant development in the field of reproductive science.
news.headline: Nucleus Genomics introduces Nucleus Embryo software for IVF with Genetic Prediction partnership. Birthrates declining in US.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Pynt, an AI-driven API security platform based in Tel Aviv, Israel, revealed a new product integration with Postman, the top API collaboration platform in San Francisco. This collaboration aims to provide instant API security insights directly within Postman's platform. This strategic partnership is expected to significantly benefit users by enhancing the security capabilities of Postman.
news.headline: Pynt and Postman team up for API security; Pynt's AI platform integrates with Postman to provide real-time insights.

news.summary: Kasmo's collaboration with Snowflake was revealed at Snowflake Summit 2025 in San Francisco on June 4, 2025. This partnership aims to drive innovation, maintain compliance, and improve customer engagement. The integration will leverage Snowflake's AI Data Cloud platform to achieve these goals.
news.headline: Kasmo partners with Snowflake to support Snowflake Openflow launch, enhancing data integration for AI era.

news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 4, 2025, a tribute band called Maiden United launched their latest EP titled Agent 666. The EP includes a heavy metal rendition of Adele's Skyfall, the popular James Bond theme song from 2012. This unique take on the hit song offers a fresh perspective, imagining how it would sound if performed by Iron Maiden. The EP is gaining attention for its creative twist on a well-known track.
news.headline: Iron Maiden tribute band Maiden United releases EP featuring heavy metal cover of Adele's Skyfall, a hit James Bond theme song. Los Angeles, June 4, 2025.

news.summary: Highlighting tools, tips, and coverage guidance to assist homeowners across the country, Mercury Insurance is emphasizing its dedication to protecting the most precious asset for homeowners during National Homeownership Month. Los Angeles, June 4, 2025 - Reaffirming its commitment, Mercury Insurance aims to support homeowners nationwide with essential resources.
news.headline: Mercury Insurance celebrates National Homeownership Month by offering tools to protect homeowners, June 4, 2025.

news.summary: Announced by the Association for Advancing Automation (A3) in Ann Arbor, Michigan, the Robotic Grinding and Finishing Conference is scheduled for July 22-23 at the Hyatt Regency Minneapolis. Co-presented with 3M, this event will bring together manufacturers, integrators, and automation experts for technical sessions and live robotic demonstrations. The conference will focus on next-generation material-removal solutions to enhance quality, throughput, and worker safety. The event is set to feature a full agenda, with the aim of uniting industry professionals for networking opportunities and discussions on advanced manufacturing technologies.
news.headline: A3 and 3M organize Robotic Grinding & Finishing Conference in Minneapolis on July 22-23 for material-removal solutions.
